free_text: Pb, Bi, Tl data on fig.
Tin isotopes preliminary data on fig.
Total neutron cross sections of isotopes and the
isobaric spin term of the nuclear potential
with time resolution 4 nsec. Angular width ~1.5deg.
Plastic scintillator 50 mm diameter, 60 mm thick
For alpha detection - plastic scintillator films.
For scattering into detector - ~0.1% for Ni and Zn
isotopes, ~ 0.2% for Ag, Cd, In, Sn, Sb, Te isotopes.
